description_long: This is a thick, stylized book with a sturdy wooden spine and greenish cover, reinforced at the corners with metallic gold brackets. The cover features a prominent horizontal maroon band with a white border, possibly serving as a decorative strap or label. Two large, rounded gold rings are attached to the spine, giving the book a unique, almost whimsical appearance. The pages are slightly textured and off-white, visible from the top and side views. A small green bookmark with a gold corner peeks out from the bottom. The overall design suggests a fantasy or magical theme, with robust construction and decorative elements.
description: A thick, fantasy-style book with a wooden spine, green cover, gold metal corners, and a maroon band across the front.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the green surface, maroon band, gold corner brackets, and part of the wooden spine with gold rings.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the top, highlighting the thickness, textured pages, and the maroon band wrapping around the cover.
description_view_2: The back cover and spine are visible, showing the wooden spine with two gold rings and the green bookmark protruding from the bottom.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying the wood texture and two large gold rings, with no cover details apparent.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is made of wood with two large gold rings attached horizontally. No text or decorative patterns are visible.
